profile.subtitle: Software engineering, full-stack development, and practical automation.
profile.tagline: Clean code. Clear systems. Useful tools.

about: I use this profile to track programming practice, project experiments, and engineering notes.
My current public stack centers on web development, backend fundamentals, automation scripts, and course/project implementations.

focus.label: Focus
focus.value: Full-stack development, backend services, automation, and software engineering practice.

focus.label: Working style
focus.value: Readable structure, explicit naming, small iterations, and verifiable results.

focus.label: Profile pipeline
focus.value: JSON data, HTML layout, Playwright screenshot, README image.

notes: Keep code paths searchable and responsibilities explicit.
Prefer small, reviewable changes over large rewrites.
Verify behavior with real commands, screenshots, or generated artifacts.
Treat README, workflows, and assets as part of the product surface.
